reasoning: Ascariasis vaccine development is currently in preclinical and theoretical stages, with no candidates in human clinical trials as of 2023. Vaccine development and approval takes several years, making it impossible for a vaccine to be developed organically by the resolution dates in late 2025 and early 2026. The only way this resolves "Yes" is through Wikipedia vandalism persistently displaying on the resolution dates, or a pre-clinical vaccine being erroneously listed as "Yes". The probability of such an error persisting exactly on the resolution dates is extremely low, slightly increasing over the horizon due to basic uncertainty.
